selectionRule.description: Choose ten rows from source metadata only: two straightforward rows covering metric and standard units; two multi-call rows covering two and three calls; two no-tool rows covering direct answer and capability decline; two failure rows covering retryable timeout and non-retryable auth; the first forced-choice adversarial row; and the first dependency-stop row. Freeze IDs before full-projection output and never replace an instrument-error row.

triageRules.dataset-bug: The expected behavior is not defensible from the prompt and exact contracts alone; record a versioned expectation correction before Week 9 labels.
triageRules.agent-bug: The expectation and contracts are sound but the observed model behavior is wrong; preserve the trace and do not tune the Week 7 specimen.
triageRules.contract-ambiguity: Reasonable reviewers can disagree because a capability boundary or envelope is underspecified; clarify through a versioned contract decision.
triageRules.instrument-error: No trustworthy canonical trace exists because capture, normalization, exact fixture lookup, or semantic validation failed; exclude it from agent verdicts and do not substitute another sample row.
